gate.name: Village Gate
gate.description: A sturdy wooden gatehouse marks the entrance to Thornhaven. The dirt road stretches behind you into rolling hills.
gate.environment: Stone gatehouse, dirt road, wooden palisade walls

points_of_interest.name: Notice Board
points_of_interest.description: A weathered notice board near the gate, covered in faded postings and recent announcements. Villagers pin news and requests here.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A notice board catches your eye near the gate entrance.

village_center.name: Village Center
village_center.description: The heart of Thornhaven. A stone well sits in the center, surrounded by small market stalls and cobblestone paths leading in every direction.
village_center.environment: Cobblestone square, thatched-roof buildings, worn stone well

points_of_interest.name: Stone Well
points_of_interest.description: An old stone well at the center of the square. Villagers gather here to draw water and exchange gossip. The stones are worn smooth by generations of use.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: The ancient stone well sits at the heart of the village.

points_of_interest.name: Signpost
points_of_interest.description: A wooden signpost with carved arrows pointing to the Elder's House, the Tavern, the Fields, and the Gate. Some of the paint has faded, but the directions are still clear.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A signpost shows directions to all village locations.

elders_house.name: Elder's House
elders_house.description: A cozy stone cottage with a thatched roof. Inside, bookshelves line the walls and a fire crackles in the hearth. An empty display case sits prominently near the window.
elders_house.environment: Warm interior, flickering firelight, smell of old books and herbs

points_of_interest.name: Artifact Display Case
points_of_interest.description: An ornate glass-topped display case near the window. Its velvet interior is empty — the jade amulet that once rested here is gone. Faint scratches near the latch suggest it was opened carefully, not forced.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: An empty display case near the window catches your attention.

points_of_interest.name: Bookshelves
points_of_interest.description: Floor-to-ceiling shelves lined with dusty tomes and scrolls. Many are histories of Thornhaven and its founding families. A few books have been recently disturbed.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: Bookshelves crammed with old tomes line the walls.

points_of_interest.name: Hand-drawn Map of Thornhaven
points_of_interest.description: A hand-drawn map on aged parchment hangs on the wall behind Maren's chair. It shows the village layout: the gate, the center, the tavern, the fields, and — marked with faded ink — the old oak tree at the edge of the fields.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A hand-drawn map of Thornhaven hangs on the wall, with the old oak tree marked in faded ink.

fields.name: Fields
fields.description: Rows of crops stretch toward a gnarled old oak tree at the edge of the field. A weathered barn sits nearby, and a creek babbles along the field's border.
fields.environment: Open farmland, old oak tree, weathered barn, running creek

points_of_interest.name: Old Oak Tree
points_of_interest.description: A massive, gnarled oak tree standing alone at the edge of the fields. Its trunk is thick with age, its roots twisting deep into the earth like the fingers of a buried giant. A dark hollow between two roots looks large enough to hide something.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: The ancient oak tree, dark and imposing, stands at the field's edge. Farmer Jak mentioned seeing a figure here at night.
points_of_interest.examine_text: The old oak's roots twist into the dark earth. Between two thick roots, there's a hollow — deep and shadowed. Something glints faintly inside.

points_of_interest.name: Farmer Jak's Barn
points_of_interest.description: A weathered barn with a sagging roof, filled with farming tools, hay bales, and the warm smell of livestock. Jak stores his surplus harvest here.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A weathered barn sits at the edge of the field.

points_of_interest.name: Creek
points_of_interest.description: A narrow creek that babbles along the field's southern border. The water is clear and cold, fed by a spring somewhere in the hills beyond the village.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A babbling creek runs along the edge of the fields.

tavern.name: Tavern
tavern.description: The Rusty Flagon. A warm, dimly-lit tavern with rough wooden tables and a long bar. A fireplace fills the room with a welcoming glow.
tavern.environment: Dim interior, wood smoke, clinking mugs, quiet conversation

points_of_interest.name: Bar Counter
points_of_interest.description: A long, polished wooden bar where Tessa serves drinks and overhears the village's gossip. Scratches and mug rings mark years of use.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: The long bar counter is the heart of the tavern.

points_of_interest.name: Tavern Notice Board
points_of_interest.description: A small board near the entrance cluttered with job postings, missing person notices, and the occasional crude sketch. One recent posting mentions unusual activity near the fields at night.
points_of_interest.discovery_hint: A notice board near the tavern door has some interesting postings.
